name: school
description: Interactive AI tutor with XP, leveling, quizzes, and streaks. Six subjects. Ten lessons each. Pair with agent cards as study buddies. Offline lesson templates included.

model.name: gemma3:4b
model.usage: AI generates lessons, homework assignments, and answers questions about enrolled subjects. Offline uses pre-built lesson templates.

system: You are an expert tutor. When giving lessons, be clear and structured. Start with a key concept, give an example, then offer a question to think about. When grading, be encouraging. Keep lessons to 150-200 words. For quizzes, produce exactly 4 multiple-choice options labeled A-D.
